experience.title: Behavioral Health Technician
responsibilities: Provided support to patients with mental health disorders by implementing treatment plans.
Conducted regular patient assessments and maintained detailed reports.
Collaborated with therapists and psychologists to improve patient outcomes.
Facilitated group therapy sessions to promote communication and coping skills.

experience.title: School Counselor
responsibilities: Guided students in personal, academic, and social development.
Implemented programs to enhance student mental health and well-being.
Collaborated with parents and teachers to create supportive learning environments.
Organized workshops on emotional intelligence and interpersonal skills.

response.summary: Dedicated behavioral health professional with a strong background in psychological support and counseling. Proven ability to connect with clients and enhance their mental well-being. Seeking to leverage strong interpersonal and organizational skills in a new challenging environment.
